title_cn: SpaceX 市值连续第三天飙升，将超越亚马逊
summary: SpaceX shares surged in premarket trading, putting the firm on track to overtake Amazon.com Inc. as the fifth largest publicly traded company in the world just days after its blockbuster debut.

title: Stocks Drift After Three-Day Rally; SpaceX Surges: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市在连续三天上涨后出现漂移； SpaceX 股价飙升：市场结束
summary: US stocks paused after a three-day rally with investors shifting their focus to a raft of central bank decisions this week. SpaceX continued to surge, on track for a more than 50% jump since going public.

title: Nike Can’t Afford to Lose This World Cup
title_cn: 耐克不能承受失去本届世界杯的代价
summary: Nike has the star power and home advantage. But with its turnaround moving slowly, the World Cup may matter more to Nike than Adidas, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andrea Felsted. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Reopening Seen Unleashing Pent-Up Gulf Grain Demand
title_cn: 霍尔木兹重新开放有望释放被压抑的海湾粮食需求
summary: An interim US-Iran deal to end their months-long war and potentially fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz is likely to trigger a rush of grain imports to nations in the Persian Gulf after months of reliance on longer, less efficient routes.

title: Bondholders Forced to Reckon With $4 Billion Tax Threat in Bitter Credit Feud
title_cn: 债权人在激烈的信贷纠纷中被迫面对 40 亿美元的税收威胁

title: 1MDB Theft Made Attila the Hun Look Like ‘Choirboy,’ Judge Says
title_cn: 法官称，1MDB 盗窃案让匈奴王阿提拉看起来像“唱诗班男孩”
summary: The judge who convicted former Malaysian Prime Minister Najib Razak over the 1MDB scandal said the plunder of the sovereign wealth fund was so vast that it eclipsed the exploits of Attila the Hun, one of history’s most notorious conquerors.

title: Dolce & Gabbana Weighs Sale of Milan Properties to Raise Cash
title_cn: 杜嘉班纳Gabbana 考虑出售米兰房产以筹集现金
summary: Dolce & Gabbana is negotiating with lenders over the potential sale of real estate assets in Milan as part of an effort to raise liquidity and refinance debt, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Middle East Oil Collapses as Contango Returns on Supply Hope
title_cn: 中东石油崩溃，期货溢价因供应希望而回归
summary: Middle Eastern crude markets have collapsed, as the US-Iran agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz spurs optimism around an increase in flows from the oil-rich region.

title: Verizon Debuts New Plan, Loyalty Program in Battle for Customers
title_cn: Verizon 推出新计划和忠诚度计划以争夺客户
summary: The freebies competition is heating up among US wireless carriers.

title: Qatar Plans to Rapidly Restart LNG Output After Hormuz Opens
title_cn: 卡塔尔计划在霍尔木兹海峡开放后迅速重启液化天然气输出
summary: Qatar is planning to rapidly boost liquefied natural gas production once the Strait of Hormuz reopens, aiming to restore most of its export capacity within two months, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Biocon's Mazumdar-Shaw Says Firm On Track To Be Top Insulin Maker
title_cn: Biocon 的 Mazumdar-Shaw 表示公司有望成为顶级胰岛素制造商
summary: Biocon Executive Chairperson Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw says she is confident that the company's investment and capacity expansion in Insulin will make the company the top hub for the drug in the next five years. She speaks in an exclusive conversation with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Empty Tankers Entering Gulf Via Hormuz Are Key for Energy Market
title_cn: 通过霍尔木兹进入海湾的空油轮是能源市场的关键
summary: The transit of empty ships through the Strait of Hormuz into the energy-rich Persian Gulf is being eagerly watched by the market, which would indicate increasing confidence in the outlook for a sustained peace deal.

title: EBA Eyes Bigger Role for Banks in Setting Key Capital Buffer
title_cn: EBA 着眼于银行在设定关键资本缓冲方面发挥更大作用
summary: Europe’s top banking regulator said watchdogs should rely more on banks to calculate how big of a safety cushion they need on top of their minimum capital requirements.

title: SpaceX Shares Surge, US & Iran Prepare for Deal Signing | The Opening Trade 6/16/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 股价飙升，美国和伊朗准备签署交易开盘交易 2026 年 6 月 16 日
summary:
The US and Iran are preparing to formally sign their interim peace deal in Switzerland on Friday, with both sides claiming victory and oil traders and shippers unsure over how quickly the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened.

SpaceX shares surged in premarket trading, putting the stock on track to extend a rally following its blockbuster debut last week.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Prospect of a Quieter Fed Could Roil Bond Prices
title_cn: 美联储更加平静的前景可能会扰乱债券价格
summary: Warsh has hinted at less communication from THE central bank.

title: SBI Plans Indian Rupee Deposits in Sri Lanka to Support Trade
title_cn: SBI 计划在斯里兰卡存入印度卢比以支持贸易
summary: State Bank of India is planning to introduce Indian rupee-denominated deposits in Sri Lanka, a move aimed at encouraging wider use of the currency in trade and investment between the neighboring nations.

title: Glencore, Trafigura Said Set to Invest in Merdeka’s HK Listing
title_cn: 嘉能可和托克表示将投资 Merdeka 在香港上市
summary: Glencore Plc, Mercuria Energy Group and Trafigura Group are among key investors planning to buy shares in the Hong Kong listing of Indonesian gold miner PT Merdeka Gold Resources, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Don’t Get Overexcited on Oil Price Moderation, AIB’s Hunt Says
title_cn: AIB 的亨特表示，不要对油价调整过度兴奋
summary: The global economy still faces multiple risks even as the US and Iran agree to halt the war in the Middle East, the head of Irish bank AIB Group Plc warned.

title: Turkey Seeks Higher Oil Flows Via Iraq Pipeline to Renew Deal
title_cn: 土耳其寻求通过伊拉克管道增加石油流量以续签协议
summary: Turkey is seeking higher oil flows through a crucial pipeline that runs through its territory from northern Iraq in order to renew a contract that expires in a little over a month, according to a Turkish official with direct knowledge of the matter.

title: Riksbank Rate Seen Steady With Norway on Edge: Decision Guide
title_cn: 瑞典央行利率保持稳定，挪威处于边缘：决策指南
summary: Sweden and Norway face contrasting economic risks, but the two Nordic neighbors are still likely to emerge with the same outcome of no change for borrowing costs this week.

title: Warsh Wants Less Fed Talk, Risking More Market Surprises
title_cn: 沃什希望美联储减少讲话，冒着更多市场意外的风险
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Ben Bernanke famously said monetary policy is 98% talk and only 2% action. Kevin Warsh wants to shake up the mix.

title: Blackstone Grows Asset-Based Lending With New Unit, Taps Garlick
title_cn: 黑石 (Blackstone) 利用 Garlick 开发新部门以发展资产贷款
summary: Blackstone Inc. rolled out a platform to lend against physical assets like inventory and equipment, as alternative asset managers increasingly muscle into territory long dominated by banks.

title: Reeves Says Her Plans Will Make UK Less Reliant on Bond Markets
title_cn: 里夫斯表示她的计划将减少英国对债券市场的依赖
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves said her ambition is to balance the budget in 2029, a more demanding target than her current fiscal rules as she pledged to make Britain less at the mercy of the bond markets.

title: Thames Water Edges Closer to Nationalization With Rescue in Doubt
title_cn: 泰晤士水务局更接近国有化，救援存疑
summary: Thames Water moved closer to temporary nationalization after a senior government minister said a rescue deal put forward by creditors wasn’t sufficient.

title: German Investor Outlook Jumps With Iran Resolution in Sight
title_cn: 随着伊朗决议的临近，德国投资者的前景跃升
summary: German investor optimism improved more than anticipated on hopes that a swift end to the Iran war will ease pressure on Europe’s largest economy.

title: Jeff Currie Says Hormuz Flows May Not Normalize Until End of the Year
title_cn: 杰夫柯里表示霍尔木兹水流可能要到今年年底才能恢复正常
summary: Jeff Currie, executive co-chairman at Abaxx Markets, says “the uncertainty remains quite high” around the Strait of Hormuz as maintaining the US-Iran ceasefire will be challenging. Currie looks at what the interim agreement means for the global oil market, what’s behind the oil price drop, and how quickly Gulf nations can restore production. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taiwan Frees Life Insurers to Deploy Capital in AI Projects
title_cn: 台湾允许人寿保险公司在人工智能项目上部署资金
summary: Taiwan is easing regulations to give life insurers flexibility to invest in artificial intelligence projects, part of an ongoing campaign by authorities to redirect a larger slice of the industry’s $1 trillion asset pool back home.

title: Emerging Stocks Near Record High on Tech Gains, Lower Oil Prices
title_cn: 新兴股市因科技股上涨和油价下跌而接近历史新高
summary: Emerging-market stocks climbed for a third day, holding near a record high, as crude prices fell further and the tech rally extended.

title: AI Stock Rally Is in Boom Phase Not Euphoria, BofA Survey Shows
title_cn: 美国银行调查显示，人工智能股票上涨正处于繁荣阶段，而非兴奋阶段
summary: The boom in artificial-intelligence stocks looks set to run further, according to a Bank of America Corp. survey, which found the majority of investors believe that the fear of missing out is continuing to drive the trade.

title: Bonds Extend Rally as Oil Falls to Lowest Since March
title_cn: 油价跌至三月以来最低水平，债券延续涨势

title: SpaceX Cements $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Following IPO
title_cn: 首次公开募股后，SpaceX 巩固了 600 亿美元的 Cursor 收购
summary: SpaceX has formally agreed to take over Cursor in a deal that values the AI coding startup at $60 billion, cementing a key part of Elon Musk’s efforts to catch up with rivals on coding tools.

title: Anthropic’s AI Runs Into DC Rule Inconsistency
title_cn: Anthropic 的 AI 遇到 DC 规则不一致问题
summary: The AI pioneer is working to allay White House concerns about national security

title: Plaud Plans New Wearable as AI Note-Taking Startup Eyes $500 Million in Sales
title_cn: AI 笔记初创公司销售额有望达到 5 亿美元，Plaud 计划推出新可穿戴设备
summary: Plaud Inc., a startup that makes artificial intelligence note-taking devices, said it’s planning to release a new wearable device later this year that can work with AI agents and that it expects to book $500 million in sales in 2026.

title: Meta’s Threads Tops 500 Million Users Three Years After Launch
title_cn: Meta 的 Threads 推出三年后用户数量突破 5 亿
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg set out three years ago to build a Twitter competitor with 1 billion users. He’s halfway there.

title: Ripple Acquires Stake in Flutterwave Valuing It at $3.3 Billion
title_cn: Ripple 收购 Flutterwave 股份，估值达 33 亿美元
summary: Flutterwave Inc., one of Africa’s most valuable financial-technology startups, sold an equity stake to Ripple, as it seeks to accelerate growth through payments expansion and strategic partnerships.

title: Trump’s Anthropic Crackdown Sets Off AI Alarms for US Allies
title_cn: 特朗普的人为镇压为美国盟友敲响人工智能警报
summary: With the recent crackdown on Anthropic, the Trump administration has given global leaders another reason to panic about their place in the technology race.

title: Corporate AI Has a Human Intelligence Mining Challenge
title_cn: 企业人工智能面临人类智能挖掘挑战
summary: Much of the information about how work actually gets done lives in employees’ heads, and capturing this knowledge is hard.

title: SpaceX Set for More Than 50% Jump in Just Three Sessions | The Pulse 6/16/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 将在短短三个交易日内上涨超过 50% |脉搏 2026 年 6 月 16 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Elise Badoy, Citi Head of EMEA Research; Colin Hunt, AIB CEO;  Jeff Currie, Abaxx Markets Executive Co-Chairman (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Offers Cheaper AI Bets as Focus Shifts, Citi’s Badoy Says
title_cn: 花旗银行的 Badoy 表示，随着焦点的转移，欧洲提供了更便宜的人工智能赌注
summary: European markets present cheaper opportunities in artificial intelligence adoption as the focus shifts from infrastructure to implementation, according to Elise Badoy of Citigroup Inc.

title: French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
title_cn: 法国安全部门将用当地公司取代 Palantir
summary: France’s domestic intelligence agency, DGSI, will replace Palantir Technologies Inc. data tools with a local alternative made by Chapsvision, as European countries increasingly seek to reduce their dependence on US tech firms.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/16/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/16/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: STMicro Eyes $1.5 Billion Convertible Bonds After AI-Fueled Jump
title_cn: 意法半导体在人工智能推动的飞速发展后着眼于 15 亿美元的可转换债券
summary: STMicroelectronics NV is looking to raise $1.5 billion from selling debt that can be exchanged into equity after the chipmaker’s shares tripled in value so far this year.

title: Goldman-Backed Go Rises 10% After Biggest Japan IPO This Year
title_cn: 日本今年最大规模IPO后，高盛支持的Go股价上涨10%
summary: Taxi-hailing app provider Go Inc.’s shares advanced 10% in its trading debut on the Tokyo Stock Exchange on Tuesday, helping to support investor sentiment after the nation’s largest initial public offering so far this year.

title: Anthropic Curbs Show Need for Sovereign AI, Upstage CEO Says
title_cn: 后台首席执行官表示，人为限制显示了对主权人工智能的需求
summary: The US directive to restrict foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s most advanced technologies underscores the importance of South Korea’s sovereign artificial intelligence efforts, according to the head of a leading domestic AI startup.

title: AI Re-Rating Fuels 550% Rally in Hong Kong’s Kingboard Laminates
title_cn: AI 重新评级推动香港建滔积层板上涨 550%
summary: Kingboard Laminates Holdings Ltd. has rallied more than sixfold this year as investors bet the Chinese supplier to the printed circuit board industry will emerge as a key beneficiary of the AI buildout.

title: Anthropic Holds Talks With US in Bid to Lift Curbs on AI Models
title_cn: Anthropic 与美国举行会谈，以期解除对人工智能模型的限制
summary: Anthropic PBC is seeking to resolve a fresh confrontation with the Trump administration over artificial intelligence security that prompted the company to disable global access to its two most advanced AI models.

title: Hong Kong Stocks Face Pressure From $33 Billion Lockup Expiry
title_cn: 港股面临330亿美元禁售期满压力
summary: Hong Kong’s underperforming stock market may come under renewed pressure as a large amount of shares frozen under restrictions tied to equities offerings become tradable next month.

title: SpaceX Surges for Second Day to Add $412 Billion in Value
title_cn: SpaceX 市值连续第二天飙升 4120 亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares jumped in their second day of trading, adding to gains following a blockbuster debut that instantly vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.

title: Fox to Buy Roku in Streaming Video Push; Shares Tumble
title_cn: Fox 收购 Roku 进军流媒体视频领域；股价暴跌
summary: Fox Corp. agreed to acquire Roku Inc. in a deal with an enterprise value of about $22 billion, creating a new television juggernaut and marking a big push into ad-supported streaming.

title: S&P 500 Set for Best Day Since April as Oil Sinks | The Close 6/15/2026
title_cn: 石油下跌，标准普尔 500 指数将迎来 4 月份以来最好的一天收盘价 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Goldman Sachs Chief Equity Strategist & Managing Director Ben Snider, Teneo Global Chair, Political Risk Advisory Kevin Kajiwara, Ariel Investments Chairman, Co-CEO & Chief Investment Officer John Rogers, Kestra Chief Investment Officer Kara Murphy, PIMCO Head of Public Policy Libby Cantrill, Elanco Animal Health CEO Jeff Simmons, & Rapper N.O.R.E & DJ EFN. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada to Restrict Use of Personal Data for Custom Prices
title_cn: 加拿大限制使用个人数据来确定定制价格
summary: The Canadian government is proposing stricter privacy rules that would limit businesses from using personal data to charge consumers higher prices, while giving individuals more power over their own information.

title: Nvidia Joins AI Borrowing Frenzy With $25 Billion Bond Sale
title_cn: Nvidia 发售 250 亿美元债券加入 AI 借贷热潮
summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. sold $25 billion of high-grade bonds, joining a wave of jumbo debt offerings from tech heavyweights as investors clamor to get exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Studios in Microsoft’s Xbox Division Brace for Closures
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 部门的工作室准备关闭
summary: The studios, which include Compulsion Games and Double Fine, are in active negotiations with Xbox and may be given the chance to go independent.

title: Rieder Says No Forward Guidance Is a Good Thing
title_cn: 里德表示没有前瞻性指引是一件好事
summary: Rick Rieder, BlackRock global fixed income CIO, says if the new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh eliminates forward guidance, it will be good for markets. He speaks about how other changes Warsh makes could impact stocks, the state of private credit and where he sees the price of bitcoin heading. He appears on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Disables AI Access for Foreign Nationals | Bloomberg Tech 6/15/2026
title_cn: Anthropic 禁止外国人使用人工智能 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down why Anthropic disabled access to its most advanced models for all foreign nationals after a request from the Trump administration. Plus, Nvidia is seeking to raise at least $20 billion from its first corporate bond sale since 2021. And, SpaceX shares throttle up on day 2 of trading, adding to a blockbuster public markets debut on Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's AI Markets Still 'A Source of Funds' Says Citigroup
title_cn: 花旗集团称中国人工智能市场仍是“资金来源”
summary: Alicia Yap, Citi's head of Pan-Asia Internet Research, breaks down where China's tech market stands amid global AI adoption. But despite all this heavy corporate activity, Citigroup warns that global investors are still treating China tech as "a source of funds," with Wall Street dumping local stocks to fund the global AI hardware trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Stocks Still Volatile, Says JPMorgan Strategist
title_cn: 摩根大通策略师表示，SpaceX 股票仍然波动
summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management global market strategist, says to expect SpaceX volatility in the next six months. She also says they are expective some big high-profile AI names, but the IPO markets are still going to be selective. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Capable of Building Orbital Data Centers, Says Former Meta CTO
title_cn: 前 Meta 首席技术官表示 SpaceX 有能力建设轨道数据中心
summary: Mike Schroepfer, former CTO of Meta and founding partner of Gigascale Capital - a venture firm making early-stage bets on companies focused on climate impact - says SpaceX is the only company capable of building orbital data centers. He also shares how ocean data centers are 100x cheaper than orbital ones. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taiwan Blasts Kenya for Detaining Scholar on China’s Behalf
title_cn: 台湾谴责肯尼亚代表中国拘留学者
summary: Taiwan criticized Kenya for detaining a scholar for 20 hours at the urging of China, underscoring Beijing’s escalating efforts to isolate the self-run island.

title: NATO Seeks to Make Up Shortfall of US Military Cuts in Europe
title_cn: 北约寻求弥补美国在欧洲军事削减的不足
summary: NATO officials on Tuesday sought to project confidence that Europe could absorb deep American military cuts to the alliance — even as the continent lacks some of the weapons Washington is planning to withdraw and has no clear path to replacing them.

title: Trump Under Pressure to Sell Iran Deal to Skeptical Allies
title_cn: 特朗普面临向持怀疑态度的盟友推销伊朗协议的压力
summary: The president is facing questions from multiple corners at home and abroad

title: India's Modi Arrives in Geneva for G7 Summit in France
title_cn: 印度莫迪抵达日内瓦出席法国七国集团峰会
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi arrived by plane in Geneva, Switzerland, before departing via helicopter to attend the Group of Seven summit in Evian, France. (Source: FDFA/Keystone-SDA-ATS Host Broadcaster)

title: Romania Premier Nominee Defies Party on Path to Form Cabinet
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人在组阁之路上挑战党派
summary: Romania’s prime minister-designate Adrian Vestea pushed ahead with attempts to find political support for his government, defying an ultimatum from his Liberal Party to drop the bid.

title: EU Lawmakers Approve US Trade Deal Ahead of Trump Deadline
title_cn: 欧盟议员在特朗普最后期限前批准美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union’s US trade deal is close to being implemented after the bloc’s lawmakers gave their final approval, forging ahead despite ongoing transatlantic trade tensions.

title: Trump Says Netanyahu Should Be More Responsible With Lebanon
title_cn: 特朗普称内塔尼亚胡应该对黎巴嫩承担更多责任
summary: US President Donald Trump, speaking at the Group of Seven Summit in Evian, France, says Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu should be "more responsible with respect to Lebanon.” He says he even suggested letting Syria fight Hezbollah instead. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US Is Not Investing Any Money in Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称美国不会在伊朗投资任何资金
summary: President Donald Trump says the US is not investing any money in Iran. He speaks during a briefing following a bilateral meeting with the Emir of the State of Qatar at the Group of Seven Summit in Evian, France. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says That Russia Should Make a Deal With Ukraine
title_cn: 特朗普称俄罗斯应与乌克兰达成协议
summary: US President Donald Trump, speaking at the Group of Seven leaders meeting in Evian, France, calls on Russia to make a deal with Ukraine. Trump says he met Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy earlier in the day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Syria Would Do Better at Taming Hezbollah Than Israel
title_cn: 特朗普称叙利亚在驯服真主党方面会比以色列做得更好
summary: US President Donald Trump vented his frustration with Israel’s military campaign in Lebanon, going as far to suggest that Syria would do a better job fighting Hezbollah there.

title: Streeting Says Markets Aren’t Villains in Bid for UK Leadership
title_cn: 斯特里廷称市场并不是争夺英国领导地位的恶棍
summary: Wes Streeting, the Labour MP who’s said he may seek to topple UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer this summer, set out a leadership pitch centered on economic growth and defended bond investors in an effort to differentiate himself from front-runner Andy Burnham.

title: AI Wrongly Blamed for Britain’s Job Losses, Analysis Suggests
title_cn: 分析表明，人工智能被错误地归咎于英国失业
summary: Artificial intelligence is yet to have a major impact on Britain’s jobs market, according to new analysis, despite fears that the technology has been sapping demand for white collar workers.

title: Netanyahu Pays a Political Price for Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡为特朗普的伊朗协议付出政治代价
summary: Benjamin Netanyahu has staked his political future on his ironclad relationship with Donald Trump — but that’s become a liability now that the US president has cut a deal with Iran that much of Israel opposes.

title: US and Iran Prepare for Deal Signing With Both Claiming Victory
title_cn: 美国和伊朗准备签署协议，双方都声称取得了胜利
summary: The US and Iran are preparing to formally sign their interim peace deal in Switzerland on Friday, with both sides claiming victory and oil traders and shippers unsure over how quickly the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened.

title: Modi Lines Up Middle-Power Talks Ahead of Trump Meeting at G7
title_cn: 莫迪在特朗普七国集团会议之前安排中等强国会谈
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will showcase India’s growing ties with middle powers at the Group of Seven summit in France before holding his first face-to-face meeting with US President Donald Trump after a year of frostiness.

title: Modi’s Moment With Trump at the G7 Is Worth the Risk
title_cn: 莫迪与特朗普在七国集团峰会上的时刻值得冒险
summary: The Indian leader’s meeting with the US president may help an economy battered by the Iran war.

title: London Mayor Khan Declines to Back Starmer
title_cn: 伦敦市长汗拒绝支持斯塔默
summary: London Mayor Sadiq Khan declined to back Keir Starmer to stay as UK prime minister until the next general election. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Real Cowboys of Crypto: Wyoming Ropes a $1 Stablecoin
title_cn: 加密货币的真正牛仔：怀俄明州绳索 1 美元的稳定币
summary: The state, home of Yellowstone and a refuge of the rich, has become the first in the US to issue its own cryptocurrency. Its experiment has national implications.

title: Two Iran-Linked Tankers Sail Through Hormuz Before Deal Signing
title_cn: 两艘与伊朗有关的油轮在协议签署前驶过霍尔木兹
summary: Two Iran-linked tankers are sailing eastward through the Strait of Hormuz ahead of the US and the Islamic Republic signing an interim peace agreement on Friday that would re-open the waterway.

title: Ukraine Hits Moscow Oil Refinery in Attack on Russia Capital
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击莫斯科炼油厂，袭击俄罗斯首都
summary: Ukrainian drones hit Moscow’s oil refinery, the latest in a series of strikes on Russian energy infrastructure that has left the nation facing a growing fuel shortage.

title: China’s Xi Pledges Support for Myanmar During Leader’s Visit
title_cn: 中国习近平在领导人访问期间承诺支持缅甸
summary: China’s President Xi Jinping pledged support for neighboring Myanmar during a visit to Beijing by his counterpart Min Aung Hlaing.

title: London Mayor Khan Declines to Back Starmer to Stay as UK Premier
title_cn: 伦敦市长汗拒绝支持斯塔默继续担任英国首相
summary: London Mayor Sadiq Khan declined to back Keir Starmer to stay as UK prime minister until the next general election, tempering his support for the premier after previously criticizing moves to oust him.

title: Lithuania’s Sinkevicius Seeks to Be Premier in Coalition Shift
title_cn: 立陶宛的辛克维丘斯寻求在联盟转变中担任总理
summary: Lithuanian Social Democrat leader Mindaugas Sinkevicius said he will seek to become the country’s next prime minister as his party attempts to reshuffle the ruling coalition.

title: UK Sanctions Russian Network That Covertly Buys Western Tech
title_cn: 英国制裁秘密购买西方技术的俄罗斯网络
summary: The UK announced new sanctions on what it said was a Russian intelligence network that has been acquiring Western technology for its military to use in Ukraine, as well as a further clampdown on its shadow fleet and illicit finance programs.

title: Israeli Bank to Sever West Bank Ties, Raising Alarm Over Economy
title_cn: 以色列银行将切断与西岸的联系，敲响经济警报
summary: One of two Israeli banks giving Palestinians access to financial services plans to end the relationship in September, a move Palestinian officials warn could put further pressure on an economy already in turmoil.

title: Sudan Ditches Iran Weapons, Courting US Support for Ending War
title_cn: 苏丹放弃伊朗武器，寻求美国支持结束战争
summary: Sudan’s army has curbed purchases of Iranian weapons, according to people familiar with the matter, as the North African nation strives to win US support in future talks to end a three-year civil war.

title: Arson Attacks Targeting Starmer Were Ordered By Russian Online
title_cn: 针对斯塔默的纵火袭击是俄罗斯在线下令的
summary: A series of arson attacks last year targeting UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer were orchestrated by a Russian-speaking Telegram account, highlighting the escalation in sabotage operations across Europe emanating from the country.

title: Trump Says Hormuz To Reopen Friday But G7 Allies Less Convinced | Daybreak Europe 6/16/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示霍尔木兹将于周五重新开放，但七国集团盟友不太相信黎明欧洲 6/16/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

European allies at the G7 summit in France appear skeptical that trade through the Strait of Hormuz can resume by the end of the week - despite President Trump insisting his timeline is on track. 

The Bank of Japan has raised its benchmark interest rate by a quarter percentage point to 1% - the highest level since 1995. The central bank also signaled that further policy normalization lies ahead.

And Nvidia joins the AI borrowing frenzy with a 25 billion dollar bond sal, while SpaceX shares extend gains, adding more than 400 billion dollars in market value. (Source: Bloomberg)
